complexity_enterprise.description: Fortune 500 / enterprise client with complex approval processes

multi_theme.description: Per additional theme beyond the first (theme-specific items only)

multi_language.description: Per additional language version (adaptation, not retranslation)

batch_production.description: Template-driven batch production after initial creative development

ip_transfer: All creative IP transfers to client upon full payment for that deliverable
